## What

[One-line description.]

## Scope

- [ ] Lesson addition (single lesson, follows LESSON_TEMPLATE.md)
- [ ] Lesson port (new language, same lesson)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Glossary / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `code/main.*` runs without error
- [ ] `quiz.json` validates (length parity, integer `correct`, 3-4 options)
- [ ] If primitive lesson: `tests/vectors.json` populated and code passes
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` row added/updated
- [ ] No production-grade rewrites (course is educational)
